description_long: This house features a blend of modern and traditional architectural elements, with a gable-roofed main section and a flat-roofed extension. The front includes a driveway with a parked car, a single-car garage, and a small porch flanked by two tall, narrow shrubs. The rear of the house opens to a spacious deck with a pergola and a swimming pool, ideal for outdoor living and entertaining. Large picture windows dominate the flat-roofed section, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The exterior is finished in light gray siding with white trim, and the landscaping includes a manicured lawn and minimalistic greenery. The overall design suggests a comfortable suburban residence with both private and social spaces.
description: A modern suburban house with a gable and flat roof, large picture windows, a garage, driveway, and a backyard pool with a pergola.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entry, and large windows on the right extension.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat-roofed extension, minimal windows, and the lawn perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the deck, pergola, swimming pool, and back entrance to the house.
description_view_3: Side view with the driveway, garage, and a clear look at the backyard pool and deck area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a single door with a small porch, flanked by tall shrubs and adjacent to the garage, with minimal decorative elements.
